title: Simple Villager Follow
description: Villagers follow the player when holding emeralds or emerald blocks.
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Simple_Villager_Follow/BH_Simple_Villager_Follow_header.webp) Now, villagers follow the player when holding emeralds or emerald blocks, similar to how animals follow specific foods. This simplifies guiding or relocating villagers, making it ideal for organizing villages or directing them to specific locations effortlessly. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Simple_Villager_Follow/BH_Simple_Villager_Follow_description.webp) When a player holds an emerald or emerald block, nearby villagers will detect the item and follow the player, maintaining a reasonable distance while navigating the environment. This functionality simplifies tasks such as gathering villagers in a central location, organizing trading hubs, or relocating them to safer or more strategic areas within a village. The mod enhances gameplay efficiency by reducing the need for complex villager transportation methods, such as minecarts or boats, making it an invaluable tool for players focused on village development or large-scale projects. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Simple_Villager_Follow/BH_Simple_Villager_Follow_faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Simple_Villager_Follow/BH_Simple_Villager_Follow_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TLfqKtxl/images/ca29d681185ccb6667b8580f58a8081d240db978.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TLfqKtxl/images/ff945fe1be7393c0656bdba6d13d05c56676ee75.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
